svg.title: Creator Cloud Studio hybrid cloud architecture and workflow
svg.desc: Paper-style architecture diagram showing browser input, EC2 container services, S3 event storage, Lambda processing, DynamoDB state, and the final result workflow.
svg.text: Creator Cloud Studio: Hybrid Cloud Submission Workflow
Containerized front-end workflow on Amazon EC2, S3-triggered serverless validation, and DynamoDB-backed result state.
Creates submission event and uploads poster
The UI shows exactly one final
short description or bad extension -> NEEDS REVISION; else READY.
Figure 1. End-to-end hybrid-cloud workflow. The synchronous path accepts the form and creates initial state; the asynchronous path validates the uploaded submission and writes one final result.
